task: make sure we know our project is https://taskai.cc/app/projects/1 commit to memory - please improve the MCP server, it is returning too many tokens that drones and overwhelm the llm. please allow all tokens but default behaviour should be to minimize tokens all the time
user_feedback_text: make sure we know our project is https://taskai.cc/app/projects/1 commit to memory - please improve the MCP server, it is returning too many tokens that drones and overwhelm the llm. please allow all tokens but default behaviour should be to minimize tokens all the time

task:
- Task management per project is out of scope; we only implement "each project has a wiki".
- Wiki pages support rich formatting via a CRDT doc (Yjs). Formatting must be separate from search text.
- Searches must be lightning fast using ONLY Postgres: full-text search on plain text + metadata, block-level.
- Real-time collaboration editing via WebSocket using Yjs, persisted to Postgres.
- Expose content via MCP: tools search_wiki, get_block, get_page_outline, get_page, get_recent_changes.
- Provide stable citations: project_id/page_id/version/block_id. 2) WebSocket endpoint for real-time Yjs:
   - ws://localhost:3000/collab?doc=page:<pageId>
   - clients sync doc updates; server persists updates to Postgres, broadcasts to peers
3) Indexing pipeline (app-level, Postgres-only):
   - store CRDT updates
   - periodically create Yjs snapshot per page version OR on demand
   - derive "blocks" from a simplified renderer that converts Yjs doc to block list + plain text
   - store blocks with:
     - canonical_json (formatting+structure)
     - plain_text (search)
     - render_html (optional minimal)
     - headings_path (for boosting)
   - Postgres FTS:
     - tsvector generated from plain_text + headings_path + title
     - GIN index
     - trigram index on title for autocomplete
4) MCP server:
   - tool search_wiki(query, project_id, limit, recency_days?) -> block hits with snippet + citations
   - tool get_block(block_id) -> full plain text + metadata
   - tool get_page_outline(page_id) -> headings tree
   - tool get_page(page_id, mode=full|outline) -> blocks in order
   - tool get_recent_changes(project_id, since_iso) -> changed pages
5) Security baseline:
   - project_id scoping on all queries
   - simple API key auth header (X-API-Key) with env var; ok for MVP
   - permissions_ref column exists but not enforced beyond project scope (leave hooks)

DATABASE MODEL (POSTGRES)
- Use UUID primary keys.
- Use separate tables for canonical doc + search blocks.
- Store Yjs up
